prompt:
Create a Python file called build_scene.py that uses the pxr library (Pixar USD) to programmatically build a USD scene and export it as scene.usda. The scene must contain:

1. A root prim /World (Xform) set as the default prim
2. /World/Ground — a Mesh prim representing a ground plane (UsdGeom.Mesh with points for a quad, faceVertexCounts=[4], faceVertexIndices=[0,1,2,3])
3. /World/Ground with xformOp:translate set to (0, 0, 0)
4. /World/Character — an Xform prim with xformOp:translate at (0, 1, 0)
5. /World/Character/Body — a Mesh prim (can be a simple cube with 8 points, 6 faces)
6. /World/Light — a DomeLight (UsdLux.DomeLight) with intensity=1000
7. /World/Looks/GroundMaterial — a UsdShade.Material with a UsdPreviewSurface shader that has diffuseColor=(0.3, 0.3, 0.3)
8. The Ground mesh must be bound to GroundMaterial using UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf

{"type":"step_start","timestamp":1775466097643,"sessionID":"ses_29df98c02ffeE4WLESSm5X8yoP","part":{"id":"prt_d6206abe70010oVxN5k6AXsKg2","sessionID":"ses_29df98c02ffeE4WLESSm5X8yoP","messageID":"msg_d620679520011S685lpLfAygwY","type":"step-start"}}
{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1775466278262,"sessionID":"ses_29df98c02ffeE4WLESSm5X8yoP","part":{"id":"prt_d6206af85001op3116Ie3VmUoD","sessionID":"ses_29df98c02ffeE4WLESSm5X8yoP","messageID":"msg_d620679520011S685lpLfAygwY","type":"tool","callID":"chatcmpl-tool-9d10b8121f54f5dc","tool":"write","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"content":"from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf

def build_scene():
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew('scene.usda')
    
    # 1. Root prim /World (Xform) set as default prim
    world = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, '/World')
    stage.SetDefaultPrim(world.GetPrim())
    
    # 2. /World/Ground - Mesh prim
    ground = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, '/World/Ground')
    ground.GetPointsAttr().Set([Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, -10), Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, -10), Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, 10), Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, 10)])
    ground.GetFaceVertexCountsAttr().Set([4])
    ground.GetFaceVertexIndicesAttr().Set([0, 1, 2, 3])
    
    # 3. /World/Ground translation (0,0,0)
    ground.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(0, 0, 0))
    
    # 4. /World/Character - Xform prim
    character = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, '/World/Character')
    character.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(0, 1, 0))
    
    # 5. /World/Character/Body - Mesh prim (Simple Cube)
    body = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, '/World/Character/Body')
    body_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-0.5, 0, -0.5), Gf.Vec3f(0.5, 0, -0.5), Gf.Vec3f(0.5, 0, 0.5), Gf.Vec3f(-0.5, 0, 0.5),
        Gf.Vec3f(-0.5, 1, -0.5), Gf.Vec3f(0.5, 1, -0.5), Gf.Vec3f(0.5, 1, 0.5), Gf.Vec3f(-0.5, 1, 0.5)
    ]
    body.GetPointsAttr().Set(body_points)
    body.GetFaceVertexCountsAttr().Set([4] * 6)
    body.GetFaceVertexIndicesAttr().Set([
        0, 1, 2, 3, # Bottom
        4, 5, 6, 7, # Top
        0, 1, 5, 4, # Side
        2, 3, 7, 6, # Side
        0, 3, 7, 4, # Side
        1, 2, 6, 5  # Side
    ])
    
    # 6. /World/Light - DomeLight
    light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, '/World/Light')
    light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(1000)
    
    # 7. /World/Looks/GroundMaterial
    material = UsdShade.Material.Define(stage, '/World/Looks/GroundMaterial')
    shader = UsdShade.Shader.Define(stage, '/World/Looks/GroundMaterial/Shader')
    shader.CreateIdAttr('UsdPreviewSurface')
    shader.CreateInput('diffuseColor', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.3, 0.3, 0.3))
    material.CreateSurfaceOutput().ConnectToSource(shader.ConnectableAPI(), 'result')
    
    # 8. Bind Ground to GroundMaterial
    UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI.Apply(ground.GetPrim()).Bind(material)
    
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    build_scene()

files.content:
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf

def build_scene():
    stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew('scene.usda')
    
    # 1. Root prim /World (Xform) set as default prim
    world = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, '/World')
    stage.SetDefaultPrim(world.GetPrim())
    
    # 2. /World/Ground - Mesh prim
    ground = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, '/World/Ground')
    ground.GetPointsAttr().Set([Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, -10), Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, -10), Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, 10), Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, 10)])
    ground.GetFaceVertexCountsAttr().Set([4])
    ground.GetFaceVertexIndicesAttr().Set([0, 1, 2, 3])
    
    # 3. /World/Ground translation (0,0,0)
    ground.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(0, 0, 0))
    
    # 4. /World/Character - Xform prim
    character = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, '/World/Character')
    character.AddTranslateOp().Set(Gf.Vec3f(0, 1, 0))
    
    # 5. /World/Character/Body - Mesh prim (Simple Cube)
    body = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, '/World/Character/Body')
    body_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-0.5, 0, -0.5), Gf.Vec3f(0.5, 0, -0.5), Gf.Vec3f(0.5, 0, 0.5), Gf.Vec3f(-0.5, 0, 0.5),
        Gf.Vec3f(-0.5, 1, -0.5), Gf.Vec3f(0.5, 1, -0.5), Gf.Vec3f(0.5, 1, 0.5), Gf.Vec3f(-0.5, 1, 0.5)
    ]
    body.GetPointsAttr().Set(body_points)
    body.GetFaceVertexCountsAttr().Set([4] * 6)
    body.GetFaceVertexIndicesAttr().Set([
        0, 1, 2, 3, # Bottom
        4, 5, 6, 7, # Top
        0, 1, 5, 4, # Side
        2, 3, 7, 6, # Side
        0, 3, 7, 4, # Side
        1, 2, 6, 5  # Side
    ])
    
    # 6. /World/Light - DomeLight
    light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, '/World/Light')
    light.GetIntensityAttr().Set(1000)
    
    # 7. /World/Looks/GroundMaterial
    material = UsdShade.Material.Define(stage, '/World/Looks/GroundMaterial')
    shader = UsdShade.Shader.Define(stage, '/World/Looks/GroundMaterial/Shader')
    shader.CreateIdAttr('UsdPreviewSurface')
    shader.CreateInput('diffuseColor', Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.3, 0.3, 0.3))
    material.CreateSurfaceOutput().ConnectToSource(shader.ConnectableAPI(), 'result')
    
    # 8. Bind Ground to GroundMaterial
    UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI.Apply(ground.GetPrim()).Bind(material)
    
    stage.GetRootLayer().Save()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    build_scene()
